title: CJDev's Modded Survival
description: A Modpack for a Minecraft Server of mine
body:
# Features:
- Vanilla+ Features that make Minecraft feel better
- Gathering certain materials is harder or easier
  
- Simple Voice Chat (Talk to your friends, also be careful in the Deep Dark, it might just hear you)
- Terralith & Tectonic (Large landscapes to explore or view)
- True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul (Can't we all agree the Vanilla End Fight is way too easy?)
- Do a Barrel Roll (Certainly feels better than normal flying)
- Dehydration (Your first priority should be to get some fresh water)
